channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fox News Reporter Interrupted by Protester During Live Broadcast Outside New Jersey ICE Detention Center
item.description: Fox News correspondent Alexis McAdams was interrupted during a live television broadcast outside the Delaney Hall Detention Center in Newark, New Jersey, where demonstrators had gathered to protest im...

item.title: Opinion Column Argues Ken Paxton’s Senate Primary Victory Reflects GOP’s Ethical Decline
item.description: The article is an opinion piece criticizing Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton after his decisive victory in the Republican Senate primary in Texas. The author portrays Paxton as emblematic of what he ...

item.title: How historic lead mining in northern England created rare metal-tolerant wildflower habitats
item.description: In northern England, former lead mining landscapes have unexpectedly given rise to a rare and fragile ecosystem known as calaminarian grassland. These habitats, found in scattered pockets across uplan...

item.title: Polls Show Growing Concerns Among Americans About Trump’s Physical Fitness for Office
item.description: A recent CNN analysis highlighted growing public concern over President Donald Trump’s physical health as he approaches his 80th birthday. The discussion followed Trump’s latest medical visit to Walte...

item.title: Multiple drowning deaths during UK heatwave prompt renewed water safety warnings
item.description: UK water safety organisations have issued urgent warnings following a series of fatal drowning incidents during the recent heatwave, in which at least nine people lost their lives. The deaths included...

item.title: Amirah Watson: update on her life after 2020 custody abduction case
item.description: This article gives an update on the life of Amirah Watson, a young girl whose 2020 custody abduction case attracted wide attention in the United States and later featured in a Netflix documentary. In ...

item.title: New Texas Poll Shows Ken Paxton Trailing Democrat James Talarico in Senate Race Following Trump Endorsement
item.description: A recent poll conducted by Public Policy Polling indicates that Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, who won the Republican nomination for U.S. Senate after defeating incumbent John Cornyn, faces an uph...

item.title: Internal Republican infighting erupts after Texas GOP voter outreach video sparks backlash
item.description: A routine voter mobilization video produced by the Texas Republican Party sparked unexpected controversy within conservative circles after it was shared online. The video featured Texas GOP Chairman A...

item.title: Severe Ebola Outbreak Strains Health Workers in Eastern DR Congo Amid Resource Shortages
item.description: Health workers for the eastern part of the Democratic Republic of Congo are currently under heavy pressure as they battle a fresh Ebola outbreak with very limited resources. The situation is especiall...

item.title: Internal Republican polling shows backlash over Trump’s $1.7 billion ‘anti-weaponization fund’
item.description: Internal polling circulated among Republican organizations has reportedly revealed significant voter opposition to former President Donald Trump’s proposed $1.7 billion “anti-weaponization fund,” rais...

item.title: Study identifies optimal nightly sleep range associated with healthier aging
item.description: A new large-scale study suggests that there may be an optimal range of nightly sleep linked to healthier aging outcomes. Researchers found that sleeping approximately between 6.4 and 7.8 hours per nig...

item.title: Expert warns Trump’s Iran strategy and Abraham Accords proposal may strengthen Iran’s geopolitical leverage
item.description: The article examines criticism from columnist Tom Friedman regarding former President Donald Trump’s recent approach to Iran and Middle East diplomacy. According to Friedman, Trump’s strategy—combinin...

item.title: Katie Price says husband Lee Andrews contacted her from Dubai prison amid detention and espionage claims
item.description: Katie Price has stated that she has made contact with her husband, Lee Andrews, after a period in which he was reported missing for around two weeks. According to her account, Andrews telephoned her f...

item.title: Opinion piece criticizes Trump’s shifting stance on Iran nuclear talks during Memorial Day weekend
item.description: The article is an opinion column that sharply criticizes President Donald Trump’s behavior and messaging over a Memorial Day weekend marked by conflicting statements on Iran nuclear negotiations. Acco...

item.title: CNN Panel Debates Texas Senate Race and Political Messaging Around Religion and Conservatism
item.description: A CNN “This Morning” panel discussion about the upcoming Texas Senate race sparked a heated exchange over political identity, religion, and electoral strategy. The debate centered on Democratic state ...

item.title: MS NOW Hosts Say Paxton’s Texas Senate Primary Win Could Benefit Democrats
item.description: A panel on MS NOW’s Morning Joe reacted with surprise and enthusiasm to Texas Republican Ken Paxton’s decisive victory over incumbent Senator John Cornyn in the state’s U.S. Senate primary. The discus...

item.title: Thom Hartmann criticizes U.S. healthcare system and argues racial politics undermine universal coverage efforts
item.description: In this opinion article, Thom Hartmann critiques the structure of the U.S. healthcare system, arguing that it is excessively profit-driven and contributes to poor health outcomes compared to other dev...

item.title: Alan Davies reflects on past excesses, childhood trauma and cancer diagnosis in interview
item.description: In this in-depth interview, comedian and actor Alan Davies reflects on his life, career, and personal struggles as he approaches his 60s. He discusses his experiences in the 1990s stand-up comedy circ...

item.title: Pilgrims complete symbolic stoning ritual in Mina as Hajj concludes
item.description: Muslim pilgrims taking part in the annual Hajj pilgrimage have performed the final major ritual of stoning the devil in the valley of Mina, near Makkah. From early morning, more than 1.7 million pilgr...

item.title: CNN panel debates Trump administration proposal for federal employee nondisclosure agreements
item.description: A CNN panel discussion highlighted a heated debate over a Trump administration proposal that would require federal employees to sign nondisclosure agreements (NDAs). The Office of Personnel Management...
